snapshot.description: Add `isDirty` boolean to `WorkspaceState`. Set to true on drag-and-drop. Use `NotificationFactory` to show `AlertDialog` if user attempts to change steps or leave while `isDirty` is true.
snapshot.title: Implement Dirty State & Unsaved Changes Warning

newValue.text: Add `canPop` or warning mechanism using `NotificationFactory` when trying to change steps or go back while dirty.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Add `canPop` or warning mechanism using `NotificationFactory` when trying to change steps or go back while dirty.
